name: Green Screen Explainer
description: TikTok-native green-screen format: creator stands in front of a screenshot / news article / Reddit post / chart / meme and reacts. 0-2s 'look at this' + pointing at backdrop, 2-25s explanation with optional zoom-in and circle annotations, 25-45s reaction / outro. 15-45s total, 9:16. Shows source + personality at once — a double-weave of information that beats either pure-react or pure-screenshot videos. The backdrop content (real screenshot, real article, real post) MUST be supplied by the user — the reference-required gate refuses any AI-improvised real news, real Reddit posts, or real-person tweets. Niches: news commentary, tech reviews, sports takes, finance takes, cultural meme breakdowns.

stackSummary.characterKeyframe: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter — creator pose with pointing / circle gesture, neutral background that crops cleanly. Multi-ref WITH user-supplied creator photo if a recurring persona is in play.
stackSummary.backdropOverlay: Remotion-composited. The 'green-screen' is NOT a chroma-key trick — it's a Remotion composition: the user-supplied backdrop image fills the frame, the creator video is matte-cropped (or chroma-keyed if shot against green) and positioned at bottom-right ~1/3 of frame. Circle / arrow annotations are spring-in <Sequence> overlays.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter for the talking-head clip (5-15s, 1-3 clips, generate_audio: false). veo-3.1 acceptable when synced lip-sync on a real person reference is required.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — single TTS pass, voice settings tuned to reaction tone (calm-explain / outraged / curious / sarcastic). Language follows brief.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1 word-level. Burn-in via MinimalCaptions or KaraokeCaptions positioned ABOVE the creator (so they don't block the backdrop or the creator).
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music optional, low-volume bed (-20dB / volume ~0.15). For news-commentary / outraged tone, often skipped entirely — the VO carries.

variationAxes: backdrop type (screenshot / news article / Reddit post / chart / meme image)
pointing-style (hand gesture / animated circle on backdrop / arrow overlay)
zoom-in cadence (none / once-mid / twice — pull-zoom on backdrop with creator scaled accordingly)
creator presence (full talking-head clip vs static keyframe with subtle ken-burns)
VO language (any — English default; emotional arc reads regardless)
doNotCopyLiterally: Reaction script, exact backdrop content, creator pose, exact prompts. Vibe reference only.
referenceNotes: Backdrop content (screenshot, news article, Reddit post, meme image, chart) is REQUIRED. AGENTS.md hard rule #3 refuses any AI-improvised real news, real Reddit thread, real tweet, or real chart — these always read as fabricated and are also a defamation / disinformation risk. The user must supply the backdrop image at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/. If the brief mentions a named person being reacted to, a reference of that person is also required for the backdrop (e.g. a real screenshot OF them, not an AI-generated one). Copyright-sensitive backdrops (paywalled news article screenshots, copyrighted meme art) need legal review before publish — flag and stop.
